programs.title: Tamron Hall
programs.desc: Actress Laura Orrico opens up about giving birth at 49 to baby Aviana, conceived using her late husband's frozen sperm 10 years after his death; a man shares how a shocking diagnosis of Auto-Brewery Syndrome finally proved he'd been telling the truth after two DWIs; a 21-year-old man makes medical history after doctors say a groundbreaking gene therapy cured his sickle cell disease.
